metadata.name: Data Ownership Control
metadata.description: Enforces single-service ownership of each database. A database node with more than one incoming 'connects' relationship indicates a shared database violation.
references: ADR-010 — PATCH Semantics for Schedule Updates
ADR-011 — Optimistic Locking for Daily Schedule

control.assertion: Each database node must have exactly one 'connects' relationship from its owning service.
control.remediation: If two services need the same data, the owning service must expose an API endpoint. The consuming service calls the API instead of connecting to the database directly.
